title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. elaeodes
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. elaeodes is a subspecies of the common hawkweed plant, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. elaeodes include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
